fieldValues.value: RFC-011 Change C: Add containerScope to SectionSource.type-query

Add optional containerScope?: "explicit" | "repository" | "subtree" to SectionSource.type-query. Default is "explicit" (existing behaviour: scope to containerIds[]). When "repository", the query spans all containers in the repository and containerIds[] is ignored. When "subtree", the query spans the container and all containers reachable by contains relations from the context container; containerIds[] constrains the subtree root when provided. Invariant I-011-3.

The decision-log pattern requires querying all decisions across an entire repository without maintaining a static containerIds[] list. Repository scope eliminates that maintenance burden. Subtree scope provides a middle ground for hierarchical repositories where decisions are spread across many child containers.
